name: section-edit-in-place
note: S-SECTION-EDIT (operator UAT 2026-07-17: 'add an edit button next to each song section - tapping it instantly loads that section's chords into the builder, making it quicker to refine each part'). Each buffered section card carries a ✎ edit button; tapping it loads THAT section's chords into the builder (Chords mode), and a subsequent 'Add to song' UPDATES that section in place instead of appending a duplicate. Setup: build two sections, switch to Song mode, edit the first, add a chord, re-add. Red-first: pre-fix there is NO .songSectEdit button (step fails) and Add would APPEND (section count would be 3, not 2). S-COMPOSE-CALM (2026-07-19): jam surface carries zero song chrome; capture enters via the Save sheet, the canvas is the one song editor (Save-grow / Library-continue / draft-only Save), exits via its X.

steps.label: each of the two section cards has a ✎ edit button (the feature - absent pre-fix)

S-SECTION-TAP-A11y: the card controls' VISIBLE targets (halo ::before) are >= 34px, not the cramped 22-26px that read as below the mobile touch floor (operator UAT 2026-07-17). Hit boxes were already 44px; this locks the visible affordance.
editing loads that section's 3 chords into the builder AND drops into Chords mode
refining adds a 4th chord to the builder
Add-to-song UPDATED the edited section in place: STILL two sections (not three), and the first now has 4 chords
